name: autosnippet
description: Knowledge-driven code snippets — search, insert, create, and audit directly in your editor

autosnippet.serverPort.description: Port of the AutoSnippet API server (asd ui / asd start)

autosnippet.serverHost.description: Host of the AutoSnippet API server

autosnippet.enableDirectiveDetection.description: Enable automatic detection of AutoSnippet directives in code

autosnippet.enableCodeLens.description: Show CodeLens actions above AutoSnippet directives

autosnippet.enableGuardDiagnostics.description: Enable Guard diagnostics on file save (shows violations as editor warnings)

autosnippet.enableRemotePoller.description: Enable remote command polling (飞书/Lark Bot → IDE bridge). When enabled, the extension polls for remote commands and injects them into Copilot Chat.

languageModelTools.name: asd
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Project persistent memory. Stores team decisions and tracks tasks across sessions.

Workflow: 1) prime → load decisions & tasks. 2) Respect ALL returned decisions. 3) record_decision when user agrees/disagrees on something. 4) create/close to track work.

Key operations: prime (load memory), record_decision (save agreement), create (new task), close (finish task), list/show/stats (query).

operation.description: Operation: prime, record_decision, revise_decision, unpin_decision, create, close, list, show, stats, ready, claim, progress, fail, defer, decompose, blocked, dep_add, dep_tree
